name: Adjustment audit — manual корекция оставя следа
precondition: Owner role; артикул X с quantity=10
expected_result: Запис в stock_movements с movement_type='manual_adjustment', user_id, reason
Audit log retains immutable след запис
smoke_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM stock_movements WHERE movement_type IN ('manual_adjustment','adjustment') AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
fail_means: Manual adjust без audit ред — никой не знае кой е променил.
